action_set_definitions.name: get_user_verification_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks the identity verification status of a specific user to ensure compliance before accessing PII.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user (e.g., USR-9921).

action_set_definitions.name: get_pending_request_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the specific request ID and current stage for a user's GDPR deletion request.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

action_set_definitions.name: check_legal_holds
action_set_definitions.description: Checks if any records associated with a user are subject to a legal hold which prevents deletion.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

action_set_definitions.name: get_data_inventory
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a comprehensive list of all digital and physical record categories and specific record IDs associated with a user.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

action_set_definitions.name: delete_digital_record
action_set_definitions.description: Deletes a specific digital record from the database. Should not be used for records under legal hold.

record_id.description: The ID of the digital record to delete.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user for auditing.

action_set_definitions.name: trigger_physical_manual_purge
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates a manual retrieval and purging process for a physical storage unit to remove specific user data without bulk destruction.

unit_id.description: The ID of the physical storage unit/container.

user_id.description: The unique identifier of the user whose data must be purged.

action_set_definitions.name: log_compliance_action
action_set_definitions.description: Adds a mandatory entry to the compliance logs regarding a specific data action.

user_id.description: User ID associated with the action.

action_set_definitions.name: update_request_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the final status of the GDPR deletion request in the pending queue.

request_id.description: The unique ID of the deletion request.

status.description: The final status of the request.

state_description.user_database: A list of active user records containing PII, unique IDs, and verification statuses.
state_description.pending_requests: A queue of active GDPR deletion requests and their current processing stage (verified, processing, completed).
state_description.compliance_logs: Internal immutable ledger recording timestamps and outcomes of every data access or deletion action for auditing.
state_description.system_clock: The current simulation timestamp used to calculate legal deadlines (e.g., 30-day deletion window).
